necessityProof.blockerResolved: N1 still had five sandbox-handle review archive verification renderers with identical local archive-reference helper shapes, leaving repeated markdown skeletons in a family that is already closed and read-only.
necessityProof.laterConsumer: N5 can use the thinner sandbox-handle renderers as Phase-B merge candidates after N1 finishes, and the shared archive-reference helper can be reused by later minimal-integration or fake-transport batches when their line format matches.
necessityProof.reuseDecision: The existing verification report builder already renders title, meta, entries, messages, lists, and raw lines. v2123 only adds a small archive-reference line helper to avoid keeping five copies of the same local map function.
necessityProof.growthStopCondition: The batch stops at the five same-shape sandbox-handle review renderers. Minimal integration, shard readiness, runtime pass evidence, and fake transport remain separate because their helper and section shapes differ.

sharedHelper.name: renderVerificationArchiveFileReferenceLines
sharedHelper.reason: Each migrated renderer used the same line shape: '- path: exists=...; bytes=...; digest=...'. Keeping it beside the shared report builder removes five local helper copies without changing the builder section model.

focusedRendererBatch.command: npx vitest run test/verificationReportBuilder.test.ts test/governanceGrowthRatchet.test.ts and 5 sandbox-handle review archive verification test files --testTimeout=180000

byteIdenticalCompare.method: Temporary Vitest test loaded legacy renderer source from git HEAD, rewired imports to current source modules, loaded real archive profiles, and asserted equality with each migrated renderer output.

lint.note: Warnings are the existing v2115 baseline and are outside this renderer-consolidation batch.

archiveDeliverables: 代码讲解记录_生产雏形阶段3/r2000/2094-renderer-consolidation-batch-6-v2123.md

crossProjectParallel.reason: v2123 only changes Node markdown rendering for frozen sandbox-handle archive profiles; it does not request fresh sibling evidence, live integration, or upstream service startup.
